---
title: "Heart Prediction Model"
author: "Farrah Johnson and Mariam Ikram"
date: "2026-04-06"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
```

```{r}
heart <- read.csv("heart.csv")
glimpse(heart)
summary(heart)
```
